title: Untitled
content: Research Domains Ongoing In-house Research Work Alzheimer's Disease Human Malignancies Biomedical Signal Processing Biomedical Image Processing Nanotechnology in Healthcare Diabetes and CVD Biomedical Informatics and EHR Database development for Human disease, Biomedical and Healthcare sectors Development of application software and web based servers for the above mentioned research domains. Many BTech and PhD students work for their respective projects is also streamlined towards the fulfilment of goals of CEHTI and to accomplish good quality research in the Bioinformatics, biomedical informatics and health care sectors.
